titleStmt.title: SII 9.318: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 318. (A.R. No. 83 of 1912.) ON TWO FRAGMENTS OF A SLAB LYING NEAR THE HONNATIKAMMA TEMPLE AT PARIGI, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1100, Viḷambi, Pausha, [pañ]chamī, Bṛihaspativāra. In Viḷambi neither śu 5 nor ba. 5 of Pausha was a Thursday. If pañchamī is a mistake for daśamī the date would correspond to either 19th December A.D. 1178 or 4th January 1179. The inscription belongs to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballāḷa (II), ruling at Dōrasamudra with his queen [Śān]taledēvī. It records the gift of a bell to the temple of Bhīmēśvara at Guruguñjikōlabayalu near the tank of Haṟuve in Haṟuhe-nāḍu and the grant of 800 kambas of land for the service of the god and for the upkeep of a lamp. It is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
cāravē trailōkyanagarārambha(ṁ)mū
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastaprasasti
taṁ yādavakulōdbhavaṁ dvārāvatīpu
ravarādhīsvaraṁ malerājarāja malepa
roḷu gaṇḍaṁ kadanapracaṇḍaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ tribhuvanamalla taḷekāḍu
gaṁgavāḍi noḷaṁbavāḍiyu .One or two lines after this seem to have been lost.
taledēviyaruṁ dōrasamudrada nelevīḍina
lu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadinda prithvīrājyaṁ
geyyuttamirddu © svasti śakavariṣa 1100

ṟaneya viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada pauṣya
cami brihaspativāradandu ha
ṟuhenāḍa haṟuveya keṟeya guruguṁji
kōlabayalalli śrībhīmēśvaradēvargge ghaṇṭā
rōhaṇaṁ māḍi pūjepunaskāranivēdyakkaṁ
nandādīvigegaṁ ghaṁṭeya kāhiṁgavāgi
drōharamallana kōlalli yeṁṭunūṟu
maga
ḍanū prabhutvaṁ māḍuttire sthānikaṁ
śaṁkarabhaṭṭara magaṁ maṇiyamaṁ . svadattā
ṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvva
rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ ©
Digital edition of SII 9.318 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
